title: R (on the application of Lewis) (Appellant) v Redcar and Cleveland Borough Council and another (Respondents)

metadata.title: R (on the application of Lewis) (Appellant) v Redcar and Cleveland Borough Council and another (Respondents)
metadata.summary: (a) a significant number of the inhabitants of any locality, or of any neighbourhood within a locality, have indulged as of right in lawful sports and pastimes on the land for a period of at least 20 years; and
extracts: (a) a significant number of the inhabitants of any locality, or of any neighbourhood within a locality, have indulged as of right in lawful sports and pastimes on the land for a period of at least 20 years; and
